name: Banbury Cakes
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Sifted unbleached white flour; up to 4 1/2 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, scald cream over low heat.
2. Add butter, sugar, and salt to the cream in the saucepan. Stir until sugar is dissolved.
3. Pour the mixture into a large bowl and cool it to lukewarm.
4. Dissolve yeast in tepid water in a small bowl.
5. In another bowl, beat eggs with egg white; add yeast mixture and spices to the cooled cream mixture.
6. Sift 4 cups of flour into a large bowl.
7. Add currants to the sifted flour, stirring until evenly coated.
8. Combine the egg mixture and flour-currant mixture in the large bowl.
9. Mix gently until a smooth dough forms.
10. Shape the dough into cake form and place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
11. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 30-40 minutes, or until golden brown and cooked through.
